title: paronychia capitata
intro: Paronychia capitata, also known as buttonweed or button bush, is a small, annual herb native to North America and parts of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Paronychia capitata include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Paronychia capitata can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and promote overall skin health.
